items.name: Breakfast Buffet
items.description: Adult $28; Kids 12 and under $12; Continental $22. Items are subject to availability. Eggs to Order; HOT ITEMS; Bacon / Pork Sausage / Non-Pork Selections Upon Request; Breakfast Potatoes; French Toast / Pancakes / Waffles; Hot Oatmeal / Grits; Toast / Bagels / Assorted Accompaniments; BAKED ITEMS; Assorted Pastries; Fresh Fruit Display / Seasonal Selections of Sliced and Whole Fruit; COLD ITEMS; Yogurt Parfait / Vanilla Yogurt, Granola, Dried Fruit; Charcuterie & Cheese Display / Assorted Deli Meats and Cheeses with Seasonal Accompaniments; Overnight Oats / Chia Seeds, Oats, Yogurt, Milk or Non-Dairy Milk Substitute; Dried Cereal / Milk, Non-Dairy Milk Substitutes

Eggs to Order; HOT ITEMS; Bacon / Pork Sausage / Non-Pork Selections Upon Request; Breakfast Potatoes; French Toast / Pancakes / Waffles; Hot Oatmeal / Grits; Toast / Bagels / Assorted Accompaniments; BAKED ITEMS; Assorted Pastries; Fresh Fruit Display / Seasonal Selections of Sliced and Whole Fruit; COLD ITEMS; Yogurt Parfait / Vanilla Yogurt, Granola, Dried Fruit; Charcuterie & Cheese Display / Assorted Deli Meats and Cheeses with Seasonal Accompaniments; Overnight Oats / Chia Seeds, Oats, Yogurt, Milk or Non-Dairy Milk Substitute; Dried Cereal / Milk, Non-Dairy Milk Substitutes
